series_metadata.series_description: Blank Answer Documents without student responses. Blank Answer documents do not contain written responses from students. The documents contain ten (10) versions of the answer documents and includes versions for the vision impaired and hearing impaired.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five (5) years after administration of the answer documents. Retain one for each grade level per subject level for each administration year. Review by State Archives before disposal. ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years after administration of the answer documents. Retain one for each grade level per subject level for each administration year. Review by State Archives before disposal., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
